properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5 v6 v6 v3 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Oh the wonder of Your love Leaves me speechless, undone Oh the mystery of Your grace That it covers my mistakes

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: In awe of You, I'm in awe of You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I've never known love like this, so beautiful I'll never get used to this, my heart is Yours Of this I am convinced, from now until the end I'll never know love like this, so beautiful

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When I think of what You've done Every sin You've overcome That You would do it all again I will never comprehend

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: You don't leave me where You found me You pull me up out of the mess You don't leave me brokenhearted Never break Your promises You keep giving second chances Far above what I deserve You keep telling me I'm worth it Not a love I have to earn
